transcript: Bang, bang into the room I know you want it Bang, bang all over you I'll let you have it Wait for me to let me take you back Wait for me to tell you You might have let your older head to school But I'm sure you had to graduate No, I don't need to hear you talk to God Show me what your mama gave you You got a baby Love that don't stay the same See anybody come and go to you You're leaving me, but I know you're mine Bang, bang, into the room I know you want it Bang, bang, all over you I'll let you have it Where is the meaning? Let me take you there Where is the meaning? Let me take you there Bang, bang, into the room I know you back I'ma bang, bang you to the room I know you want it, bang, bang, all over you Bang, bang, bang, bang, bang, bang Bang, bang, bang, bang, bang, bang Bang, bang, bang, cause you know I know you want it, bang, bang, all over you Work a minute, let me take you there What a man, I'll tell you
